backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Resume data types and CRUD operations (save, get, delete) keyed by session token using a Map, with blob storage mixin included.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the fix applied to all form section components to ensure input fields, textareas, and selects always have visible borders, backgrounds, and readable text colors.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Aggregated one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing styling fixes, hooks, components, and app structure changes.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes, applied globally to borders and backgrounds.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root app component rendering a welcome screen or the main resume builder layout with a sticky header, form/preview panels, and download/save action buttons.
frontend/src/components/CertificationsSe: Repeatable form section for certification entries with inputs for name, issuer, issue date, and expiry date, all styled with explicit visible border and white background classes.
frontend/src/components/EducationSection: Repeatable form section for education entries with inputs for degree, major, institution, and graduation year, all styled with explicit visible border and white background classes.
frontend/src/components/ExperienceSectio: A form section component for managing work experience entries, supporting add/remove/update operations for fields like job title, company, dates, and description.
frontend/src/components/PersonalInfoSect: A form section component for capturing personal information including name, job title, contact details, professional summary, LinkedIn, and GitHub URLs.
frontend/src/components/ProfilePhotoSect: A component that handles profile photo upload via file input, displays a preview with a remove button, and manages object URL lifecycle to prevent memory leaks.
A form section component for managing project entries, supporting add/remove/update operations for fields like project name, tech stack, link, and description.
frontend/src/components/ResumeForm.tsx: The main resume form component that composes all section components (personal info, education, experience, skills, projects, certifications) inside an accordion layout with a profile photo section at the top.
frontend/src/components/ResumePreview.ts: A read-only resume preview component that renders all form data (personal info, education, experience, skills, projects, certifications, photo) as a styled, print-ready HTML layout with skill level dot bars and section headings.
frontend/src/components/SkillsSection.ts: React component for managing a list of skills, each with a name input and proficiency level selector, supporting add and remove operations.
frontend/src/components/WelcomeScreen.ts: Landing/welcome screen component displaying app branding, a feature list, and a 'Get Started' CTA button with a gradient background.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloadImage.ts: Custom hook that renders a referenced DOM element to a PNG image via SVG foreignObject and triggers a file download.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloadPDF.ts: Custom hook that generates a styled HTML resume document from form data (including base64-encoded profile photo) and triggers a download, with skill dot indicators and section formatting.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching (`useGetResume`) and saving (`useSaveResume`) resume data via the ICP backend actor using a session token.
frontend/src/hooks/useResumeData.ts: Custom React hook that manages resume form data by syncing between localStorage and a backend API, with helper functions to convert between local form types and backend Resume types.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind base styles, CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using oklch colors, and explicit overrides to ensure form inputs always have visible borders, backgrounds, and text colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/types/resume.ts: TypeScript type definitions and default factory functions for resume form data structures including PersonalInfo, Education, Experience, Skill, Project, and Certification.
frontend/src/utils/sessionToken.ts: Utility that generates and persists a random hex session token in localStorage, used to identify anonymous users.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, oklch-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the resume builder app's version, known issues (invisible input fields unless hovered), and existing feature fix requests.
